data.title: The Fiber Weave Skew Problem Is Over: ACCM Celeritas™ SF1600 Delivers Zero-Skew for PCIe 7, 224 Gbps and Beyond
data.description: In San Jose, California, Advanced Chip & Circuit Materials, Inc. (ACCM) unveiled the Celeritas SF1600. This new laminate and prepreg material is designed to address the issue of fiber weave skew by targeting the root cause. Fiber weave skew, a materials challenge, occurs when woven glass in a laminate creates spatially periodic variations in dielectric properties. This causes differential pairs of conductors to follow different paths through resin-rich and glass-rich areas, leading to time delays. The Celeritas SF1600 aims to eliminate this problem in electronic circuits.

data.title: SouthState Bank Corporation to Announce Quarterly Earnings Results on Thursday, April 23, 2026
data.description: Winter Haven, Florida - On April 3, 2026, SouthState Bank Corporation (NYSE: SSB) disclosed its plans to unveil its first quarter 2026 earnings on April 23, 2026. The announcement will come after market hours, and interested investors will be able to review the results following the release.

data.title: Antier Expands Global Web3 Consulting to Support Next-Generation Digital Economies
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in New Delhi, Antier, a prominent blockchain consulting and development firm, is enhancing its worldwide Web3 consulting services to accommodate the rise of advanced digital economies amid the fast-changing global financial and digital environment. The company aims to bolster its position in the industry and expand its reach to support the evolving landscape, reflecting the increasing demand for innovative solutions in the digital realm. This move signifies a commitment to embracing and adapting to the changing dynamics of the industry while leveraging the opportunities presented by the evolving digital landscape. By strengthening its global Web3 consulting capabilities, Antier is poised to play a crucial role in shaping the future of digital economies and blockchain technology.

data.title: 100GROUP Michigan Brings the Community Together Again at the Chamber of Commerce February BASH
data.description: In Grand Haven, Michigan, the Chamber BASH was recently held by 100GROUP Michigan, uniting over 100 local professionals for a night focused on networking and community building.

data.title: Physical AI Market worth $15.24 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: A recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals the forecasted growth of the global physical AI market. Starting at USD 1.50 billion in 2026, the market is expected to reach USD 15.24 billion by 2032, showing a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 47.2% throughout the forecast period. The report includes comprehensive insights with 150 market data Tables and 60 Figures for in-depth analysis.

data.title: HiTHIUM's kAh-Level 6.25MWh BESS Receives International Certification Following Large-Scale Fire Test
data.description: A company called HiTHIUM presented its complete energy storage solutions at ESIE 2026 in Beijing from April 1-3, 2026. The showcased products included the ∞Cell 1175Ah long-duration energy storage (LDES) battery and BESS, in addition to its AIDC full-duration energy storage technology.

data.title: LightStim and Hand & Stone Announce National Launch of FDA-Cleared Elipsa
data.description: After a successful pilot program, an expanded partnership has been established to provide clinically proven LED therapy to spa guests across the country. LightStim, known for its professional-grade LED light therapy products, has joined forces with Hand & Stone Massage and Facial Spa. The collaboration was announced on April 3, 2026, in Irvine, California. This partnership aims to bring the benefits of LED therapy to more individuals nationwide.

data.title: Frisco TMJ and Airway Dentist Dr. Dunia Korous Launches New Millennium Smiles Website Focused on Sleep Apnea and Advanced Dental Care
data.description: Highly experienced dentist Dr. Dunia Korous, known for her expertise in TMJ therapy and airway-focused dentistry, has introduced a new website for Millennium Smiles based in Frisco, Texas. The updated website features the practice's cutting-edge treatment options, such as the FDA-cleared devices.
